---
title: "UL1: Students' learning and the teacher role, 2026"
format:
  html:
    css: ../styles.css
---

[← Back to Teaching](../teaching.qmd){.button}

- **20 minutes: Individual responses to 18 multiple-choice questions**
    - One answer is *more correct* than the others
    - Only answer once
    - No feedback

- **30 minutes: Team responses to the same questions**
    - Only one person in each team opens the Canvas quiz
    - You get immediate feedback (correct / incorrect)
    - Retry the test until you get everything correct
    - If you think the “correct” responses are incorrect, let’s discuss it

- **Discussion of hard or unclear questions**

- **BREAK**

- **20 minutes: Team responses to 2 application questions**
    - Only one person in each team opens the Canvas quiz
    - No feedback
    - Be really sure about your answers

- **Defend your answers after the application exercise**


[← Back to Teaching](../teaching.qmd){.button}
